title: Party in the U.S.A.
why_this_song: Party in the U.S.A. by Miley Cyrus (2009) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 15 times; first heard in: "And a Jay-Z song was on"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Yeah, it's a party in the U.S.A."
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Yeah, it's a party in the U.S.A."
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "So I put my hands up"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "They're playin' my song, the butterflies fly away"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "song" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "song" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I hopped off the plane at LAX
Yeah, it's a party in the U.S.A.
So I put my hands up

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: With a dream and my cardigan
They know I'm gonna be okay

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Party in the U.S.A." in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Party in the U.S.A." em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Party in the U.S.A." to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Party in the U.S.A.", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Party in the U.S.A." with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Party in the U.S.A." com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
